SitePage /gatsby-theme-carbon/components.title: MiniCard
SitePage /gatsby-theme-carbon/components.description: Although the mini-resource card has a similar geometry to the button component, they should not be used in place of a button. Buttons encourage action from the user and affect the website's front-end or back-end. The resource cards, both large and mini are essentially links. They are used for navigation and actions that do not affect the website.
